title: Repo-Boundary Enforcement — Fail-Closed Filesystem Sandbox
reconciled: 2026-07-22 (supersedes initial Option-C command-scanner design; bubblewrap sandbox chosen)
goal: Run opencode + descendants inside a fail-closed Linux bubblewrap filesystem sandbox whose empty mount namespace exposes only an explicit RO runtime substrate + minimal synthetic /etc and mounts the active workspace RW, excluding sibling repos/folders; defended in depth by the already-shipped static invariant (external_directory=deny, 33be136) and a startup liveness-guard plugin. No command-string scanner (rejected: cannot be authoritative).

success_criteria.check: Static invariant DONE (33be136): structural-check Check 7 asserts external_directory==deny; fails on ask/allow/missing-field/missing-file/malformed/array/bun-error

Launcher is fail-closed: opencode-sandbox.sh exits nonzero and runs no opencode child when bwrap missing/broken, userns disabled, unsafe mount path, or preflight rejects the workspace (broad roots, linked worktrees, non-git, descendant mountpoints, sockets/FIFOs/devices, st_nlink>1, symlinked state)

Launcher contains: real bwrap run — in-workspace read/write + git status pass; fixture-sibling ls/git -C fail; python direct/computed/subprocess read fail; workspace->sibling symlink fail; outside write leaves host sentinel unchanged
Liveness guard detects mislaunch: repo-boundary.ts throws on missing/malformed marker or directory!==expected root; initializes when both match
No sandbox state ships: .sandbox-state/ gitignored, sync-template.sh excludes it, absent from .template-manifest.json; launcher/tests/plugin ship
success_criteria.verify: grep -q sandbox-state .opencode/.gitignore && sync-template.sh run && ! grep -q sandbox-state .opencode/.template-manifest.json

success_criteria.check: Decision recorded in MEMORY.md + bead closed (.active removed) after manual-activation closeout

plans.title: Contract reconciliation + runtime launcher + liveness guard

tasks.title: Reconcile spec/prd/research to supersede the rejected command-scanner; rewrite around the bubblewrap launcher; create plan.md + progress.md
tasks.end_state: spec.md/prd.json/research.md describe the fail-closed bubblewrap launcher as authoritative; static invariant marked DONE (33be136); liveness guard is a mislaunch detector not a path scanner; no command-string scanner claims; plan.md + progress.md exist
tasks.verify: rg -n 'bubblewrap|fail-closed' spec.md && rg -n '33be136' spec.md && ! rg -n 'authoritative wall' spec.md && bun -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("prd.json"))'

tasks.title: Launcher TDD: opencode-sandbox-test.sh RED then opencode-sandbox.sh GREEN
tasks.end_state: Fail-closed bubblewrap launcher ships: trusted external config (owner-controlled, not group-writable, parsed without eval); --clearenv + terminal/locale + explicit provider/proxy vars; root discovery with GIT_* removed; require normal-checkout .git dir; reject broad roots/linked-worktrees/non-git/descendant-mountpoints/sockets/FIFOs/devices/st_nlink>1/symlinked-state; .sandbox-state/{config,cache,data,state} umask 077 root 0700; empty namespace (--unshare-all --share-net --disable-userns --new-session --die-with-parent --clearenv); /proc /dev tmpfs /tmp /run sandbox-home; workspace RW same canonical path; /usr + system runtime RO; synthetic minimal /etc; exact configured opencode/bun executable files; containment capability probe before launch; host-side unmounted canary; never fall back to raw opencode

tasks.title: Liveness-guard TDD: repo-boundary.test.ts RED then repo-boundary.ts GREEN
tasks.end_state: Startup plugin proves marker present + canonical directory===expected root; throws on missing/malformed marker or root mismatch; initializes when both match. Test dynamically checks the plugin before import (RED is behavior, not compile). Fresh-process test proves raw startup exits nonzero + wrapped startup loads. If OpenCode swallows plugin factory throws, STOP — do not claim fail-closed from the plugin.

plans.title: Lock invariant + export without state + manual activation closeout

tasks.title: Static invariants + verification wiring (structural-check Check 7 + verify.sh bwrap integration; missing bwrap = hard FAIL not SKIP)
tasks.end_state: structural-check Check 7 asserts external_directory==deny (DONE 33be136); verify.sh runs the invariant test + real-bwrap integration; outside-sandbox=real bwrap, inside-sandbox=root/mount/canary liveness (no nested bwrap)
tasks.note: Check 7 + invariant test DONE; verify.sh bwrap integration pending Plan 01 Task 2

tasks.title: Package without exporting state (export assertion RED then sync-template GREEN)
tasks.end_state: Launcher/config/plugin/tests ship; .sandbox-state/ never in template/manifest; launcher mode survives export; docs explain trusted install/Linux-only/network+secret limits/normal-checkout/sandbox-local provider+git
tasks.verify: grep -q sandbox-state .opencode/.gitignore && bash .opencode/tool/sync-template.sh && ! grep -q sandbox-state .opencode/.template-manifest.json && bash .opencode/tool/verify.sh (exit 0)

tasks.title: Manual activation + evidence-based closeout (USER checkpoint)
tasks.end_state: Commit release candidate; USER manually installs wrapper (install -Dm0555 .opencode/tool/opencode-sandbox.sh ~/.local/bin/opencode-sandbox + install -Dm0600 .opencode/tool/opencode-sandbox.conf.example ~/.config/opencode-sandbox/config); user configures executable paths + provider-allowlist + sandbox-local git identity; quit+restart via wrapper; in fresh session run opencode-sandbox-test.sh --active + verify.sh; ONLY then record evidence in MEMORY/roadmap/state, delete .active, commit closeout
tasks.verify: USER runs opencode-sandbox-test.sh --active (exit 0) in a fresh wrapped session; then rg -n 'repo-boundary enforcement' .opencode/artifacts/MEMORY.md && test ! -e .opencode/artifacts/.active
tasks.note: Hard manual checkpoint — cannot complete autonomously

open_questions.question: Exact opencode/bun executable paths to bind (not arbitrary PATH dirs)
Sandbox-local provider auth + git identity bootstrap (import vs in-sandbox /connect)
open_questions.resolution: Resolve in Plan 02 Task 2/3 with the user

open_questions.question: Does 'git passes' include commit + push (HTTPS origin, no local identity today)?
webclaw-mcp executable closure without binding arbitrary home/PATH dirs

stop_conditions: Bubblewrap cannot establish working empty-namespace containment on this host (kernel/userns disabled and unfixable) -> keep static invariant; document; recommend rootless Podman
Launcher cannot stay fail-closed without a fallback that defeats the purpose -> keep static invariant; document negative result
Liveness guard cannot prove a thrown factory aborts opencode startup -> drop guard (keep launcher + invariant), do not claim fail-closed from the plugin
Containment tests cannot be made deterministic in isolated fixtures -> keep static invariant; document
non_goals: A tool.execute.before command-string path scanner (rejected design — cannot be authoritative)
Secret isolation (credentials readable by same-UID descendants)
Malicious-repo / malicious-model-code threat (workspace-owned launcher is not a durable trust anchor; V1 = accidental path drift unless immutable external wrapper installed)
Linked-worktree support in V1 (fail closed; normal checkouts only; .git pointer not trusted)
Auto-install of bubblewrap (ask the user if unavailable)
A permission.ask plugin hook or permission-event observability (redundant under deny + locked config)
Modifying upstream opencode or bumping the pinned SDK
Cross-platform support (Linux + bubblewrap only; rootless Podman/container is the documented alternative)
